parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE gda_label='PURSUE') AS pursue_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE gda_label='EVALUATE') AS evaluate_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE gda_label='MONITOR') AS monitor_count,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(estimated_value),0) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE gda_label IN ('PURSUE','EVALUATE')) AS weighted_pipeline,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ft_opportunity_signal WHERE active=true) AS ft_signals,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE response_deadline BETWEEN NOW() AND NOW() + INTERVAL '30 days' AND gda_label NOT IN ('PASS')) AS due_30d,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE response_deadline > NOW() + INTERVAL '90 days' AND gda_label='PURSUE') AS pursue_90d_plus;

SELECT id, opp_title, agency, gda_score, gda_label, stage, estimated_value, response_deadline, source_url, naics_code FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE gda_label IN ('PURSUE','EVALUATE') ORDER BY gda_score DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT signal_id, title, agency, horizon, estimated_value, signal_strength, recommended_action, solution_path, source_id, source_url, external_url FROM ft_opportunity_signal WHERE active=true ORDER BY signal_strength DESC LIMIT 5;

WITH top_pursue AS (
  SELECT id, opp_title, agency FROM gda_opportunity_tracker
  WHERE gda_label='PURSUE' ORDER BY gda_score DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  t.id as opp_id, t.opp_title, t.agency,
  (
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('vendor', ia.vendor_name, 'dollars_obligated', ia.dollars_obligated, 'award_count', ia.award_count, 'size', ia.vendor_size) ORDER BY ia.dollars_obligated DESC)
    FROM gda_incumbent_analysis ia
    WHERE LOWER(ia.agency) LIKE '%' || LOWER(SPLIT_PART(t.agency, ' ', 1)) || '%'
    LIMIT 3
  ) as incumbents
FROM top_pursue t;
